step_rationale: Decreased polyunsaturated phosphatidylcholine predicts post-MI mortality; myocardial lipid remodeling marker.
mechanism: Decreased PC (20:0/20:3) content post-MI reflects myocardial membrane lipid catabolism and cardiomyocyte injury severity.

references.title: Lipidomic analyses reveal potential biomarkers for predicting death and heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
